concerns.text: UCI HAR (activity recognition) and UCI DROP (reading comprehension QA) lack binary protected attributes and binary outcomes required for fairness metric computation. With only 2-3 high-fit datasets (COMPAS variants, Synthetic Compassion), the ≥5 dataset requirement may not be met even with skip logic. Consider adding verified fairness-relevant datasets (e.g., UCI Adult, German Credit, Law School Admission) to ensure sufficient suitable datasets.

The note acknowledges variable fit uncertainty but does not provide contingency if ≥5 suitable datasets are not found. Add explicit fallback strategy (e.g., 'If <5 suitable datasets, document constraint and proceed with available datasets' or 'Expand verified URL list to include additional fairness-relevant sources').
